## Usage

1. Click on **🚀 Open** to load the model directly in the web editor
2. Click on **📄 View** to see the BUML source code on GitHub
3. Each model folder also contains a README.md with direct links

## Editor URL

The models open in: `http://editor.besser-pearl.org`

*Note: Make sure the BESSER Web Modeling Editor is running and accessible at the URL above.*
